# zstack_sdn_controller (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage SDN (Software-Defined Network) controllers in ZStack. An SDN controller is used to manage network virtualization and provides centralized network management capabilities.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip` (String) The IP address of the SDN controller.
- `name` (String) The name of the SDN controller.
- `vendor_type` (String) The vendor type of the SDN controller (e.g., OVN, ODL).

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the SDN controller.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) The password for authentication with the SDN controller.
- `username` (String, Sensitive) The username for authentication with the SDN controller.
- `vendor_version` (String) The version of the SDN controller vendor software.

### Read-Only

- `status` (String) The status of the SDN controller.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the SDN controller.
